summary: Iteration 32 Testing - Pod Management features: 1) Add Member dropdown data source, 2) Team lead removability. All features tested and VERIFIED WORKING. The Select Employee dropdown correctly pulls from admin/super_admin users (Super Admin, Admin Testing) with '(platform)' suffix. Team leads can be removed via the 'Remove' button (data-testid='remove-team-lead-btn') and re-assigned to different users.

issues: Mixed content warning: Notifications API called with HTTP instead of HTTPS - causes failed fetch (pre-existing issue)

add_member_modal.modal_opens: PASS - Click 'Add Member' opens 'Add Member to Alpha Team' modal
add_member_modal.dropdown_data_source: PASS - Shows 'Super Admin (platform)' and 'Admin Testing (platform)' (admin users with linked accounts)
add_member_modal.employees_without_accounts: EXPECTED - Ben Carter Kyle, Cleaner T., Asco b do NOT appear (no linked user accounts)
add_member_modal.department_info: PASS - Shows '(platform)' suffix for admin users

role_selector.all_roles_present: PASS - 5 roles: Team Lead, BDR, CSM, Technician, Support Agent
role_selector.team_lead_selectable: PASS - Can select Team Lead role

add_team_lead_flow.select_user: PASS - Can select 'Super Admin (platform)' from dropdown
add_team_lead_flow.add_member: PASS - Clicking 'Add Member' adds user as team lead
add_team_lead_flow.team_lead_section_updated: PASS - Team Lead section shows 'Super Admin' with badge

remove_team_lead.remove_button_visible: PASS - data-testid='remove-team-lead-btn' is visible next to team lead
remove_team_lead.confirmation_dialog: PASS - Shows confirmation dialog 'Remove this member?'
remove_team_lead.team_lead_cleared: PASS - After removal, shows 'No team lead assigned'
remove_team_lead.backend_clears_fields: PASS - DELETE /api/pods/{pod_id}/members/{user_id} clears team_lead_id and team_lead_name

reassignment_after_removal.user_available_again: PASS - After removing Admin Testing, they reappear in dropdown
reassignment_after_removal.can_add_new_team_lead: PASS - Can select and add Super Admin as new team lead

members_section.member_display: PASS - Shows member name, email, role badge
members_section.member_remove_button: PASS - Remove icon visible for all members including team lead

backend_api_tests.GET_pods: PASS - Returns list of pods with team_lead info
backend_api_tests.GET_pod_details: PASS - Returns pod with members array and team_lead_id/name
backend_api_tests.POST_add_member: PASS - Adds member with team_lead role, updates pod.team_lead_id/name
backend_api_tests.DELETE_remove_member: PASS - Removes member, clears team_lead fields if removing team lead

critical_code_review_comments: PodManagement.jsx lines 58-119: fetchData correctly fetches employees + users and combines them
PodManagement.jsx lines 212-215: availableUsers filter correctly checks _linked_user_id
PodManagement.jsx lines 398-407: Team Lead Remove button has correct data-testid and calls handleRemoveMember
pods.py lines 364-367: DELETE /pods/{pod_id}/members/{user_id} correctly clears team_lead_id/name when removing team lead
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 tested Add Member dropdown data source and team lead removal. The Select Employee dropdown shows admin/super_admin users from /api/users/ who have linked accounts. Employees from /api/employees/ (Ben Carter Kyle, Cleaner T., Asco b) do NOT appear because they lack linked user accounts (_linked_user_id is null). Team lead removal works via Remove button (data-testid='remove-team-lead-btn') and backend correctly clears team_lead_id/team_lead_name when team lead is removed.
